_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Selumetinib was rapidly absorbed in the plasma, reaching a median C max of 657 ng/mL within approximately 1 h (median T max ). Mean plasma concentration–time profiles and PK parameters showed minimal variability between individuals and genotypes
details: Selumetinib achieved rapid absorption with median Cmax of 657 ng/mL within 1 hour, with minimal variability between WT and NF1 genotypes
